sample.title: ACCOUNTANTS ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ACCOUNTANTS ACT (Chapter 268 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ACCOUNTING STANDARDS ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ACCOUNTING STANDARDS ACT (Chapter 267 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ADMIRALTY JURISDICTION ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ADMIRALTY JURISDICTION ACT (Chapter 179 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ADOPTION OF CHILDREN ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ADOPTION OF CHILDREN ACT (Chapter 205 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: AGRICULTURAL PESTS AND NOXIOUS PLANTS ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the AGRICULTURAL PESTS AND NOXIOUS PLANTS ACT (Chapter 43 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: AIR NAVIGATION ACT (Repealed by Civil Aviation Order, 2006 (S 63/2006) w.e.f. 20-5-2006)
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the AIR NAVIGATION ACT (Repealed by Civil Aviation Order, 2006 (S 63/2006) w.e.f. 20-5-2006) (Chapter 113 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: AIRPORT PASSENGER SERVICE CHARGE ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the AIRPORT PASSENGER SERVICE CHARGE ACT (Chapter 188 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ALLIED HEALTH PROFESSIONS OF BRUNEI DARUSSALAM ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ALLIED HEALTH PROFESSIONS OF BRUNEI DARUSSALAM ACT (Chapter 221 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ANIMAL (DISEASES AND QUARANTINE) ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ANIMAL (DISEASES AND QUARANTINE) ACT (Chapter 254 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ANTI MONEY-LAUNDERING ACT (formerly known as MONEY-LAUNDERING ORDER) (Repealed by Criminal Asset Recovery Order, 2012 (S 47/2012) w.e.f. 16-6-2012)
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ANTI MONEY-LAUNDERING ACT (formerly known as MONEY-LAUNDERING ORDER) (Repealed by Criminal Asset Recovery Order, 2012 (S 47/2012) w.e.f. 16-6-2012) (Chapter 209 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ANTI-TERRORISM (FINANCIAL AND OTHER MEASURES) ACT  (Repealed by Anti-Terrorism Order, 2011 (S 45/2011) w.e.f. 18-7-2011)
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ANTI-TERRORISM (FINANCIAL AND OTHER MEASURES) ACT  (Repealed by Anti-Terrorism Order, 2011 (S 45/2011) w.e.f. 18-7-2011) (Chapter 197 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ANTI-TRAFFICKING IN PERSONS ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ANTI-TRAFFICKING IN PERSONS ACT (Chapter 230 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ANTIQUITIES AND TREASURE TROVE ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ANTIQUITIES AND TREASURE TROVE ACT (Chapter 31 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: APPLICATION OF LAWS ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the APPLICATION OF LAWS ACT (Chapter 2 of the Laws of Brunei).

sample.title: ARBITRATION ACT
sample.claimText: Brunei Darussalam enacted the ARBITRATION ACT (Chapter 173 of the Laws of Brunei).
